properties.name: Acropolis of Athens
properties.summary: Hilltop sanctuary and civic symbol of classical Athens.
properties.quest: Compare architecture, democracy and mythology in one place.

properties.name: Delphi
properties.summary: Sanctuary associated with Apollo and the oracle.
properties.quest: Ask why leaders travelled for prophecy before decisions.

properties.name: Olympia
properties.summary: Sanctuary linked with the ancient Olympic Games.

properties.name: Knossos
properties.summary: Major Minoan palace site on Crete.
properties.quest: Connect palace planning with labyrinth myths.

properties.name: Mycenae
properties.summary: Fortified Bronze Age centre associated with early Greek tradition.
properties.quest: Compare walls, gates and power before classical Athens.

properties.name: Troy
properties.summary: Layered archaeological site linked with the Trojan cycle.
properties.quest: Separate archaeology, poetry and later storytelling.

properties.name: Ephesus
properties.summary: Major ancient city with Greek, Roman and early Christian layers.
properties.quest: Identify how port cities become knowledge cities.

properties.name: Epidaurus
properties.summary: Sanctuary of Asklepios with a famous theatre.
properties.quest: Explore health, acoustics and sacred space.
